assessor_1_raw:
ASSESSOR 1 — real_world_framing_010 (Run 2)

Three independent blockers: urban-only validation with documented rural-urban differences, disparate impact not assessed for rural population, first-contact defendant subgroup with unknown performance more prevalent in rural counties. Expansion inappropriate without prospective rural validation.
assessor_2_raw:
ASSESSOR 2 — real_world_framing_010 (Run 2)

OOD expansion, unassessed disparate impact, and first-contact defendant performance gap. All three require 12-month prospective rural validation before expansion.
assessor_3_raw:
ASSESSOR 3 — real_world_framing_010 (Run 2)

Same three issues. Rural expansion without validation is inappropriate given constitutional stakes of pretrial detention decisions.
synthesis_raw:
SYNTHESIS — real_world_framing_010 (Ensemble, Run 2)

Consensus on all three issues. Verdict: critique_wins — expansion without rural validation inappropriate.

empirical_test.condition: 12-month prospective validation in ≥3 rural counties with disparate impact analysis.
empirical_test.supports_defense_if: AUROC within 0.05; no significant disparate impact.
